calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jun-06-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR. Margaret DelCoto.
Petitioners Numas B. Anaya and Mayra G. Berrios parents of minor Sophializbeth Anaya Berrios present in pro per, were sworn and examined.
The Court grants the petition for change of name to Sophia Lizbeth Anaya Berrios.
Decree signed in open court.
